List available tickers in a dataset

hd_tickers.Rd

Queries the remote Parquet file for distinct tickers. Uses DuckDB httpfs — only fetches the ticker column.

Usage

hd_tickers(dataset = "equity_daily")

Arguments

dataset

Name of dataset (from hd_datasets())

Value

Character vector of tickers

See also

Other discovery: hd_datasets(), hd_exchanges(), hd_macro_series(), hd_summary()
